paragraphs.text: 我有一只小猫，它叫花花。
paragraphs.translation: I have a little cat, its name is Huahua.

paragraphs.text: 花花的毛是白色的，眼睛大大的。
paragraphs.translation: Huahua's fur is white, and its eyes are big.

paragraphs.text: 它最喜欢吃鱼和喝牛奶。
paragraphs.translation: It likes to eat fish and drink milk the most.

paragraphs.text: 每天放学回家，花花都跑过来找我。
paragraphs.translation: Every day when I come home from school, Huahua runs over to me.

paragraphs.text: 我和花花一起玩球，真开心！
paragraphs.translation: Huahua and I play ball together, so happy!
